title: Manhunt
description: A modpack to do manhunts with. Go to full description to see how to use this.(Note: i am not affiliated with dream in any way)
body:
# --Overview And How To Use--  
**This modpack was made to make manhunts interesting and easy to do. It also has optimization mods to keep the performance good. The mod pack works with [The Heartstone Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/heartstone 'The Heartstone Mod') and [The Starterkit Mod](https://https://modrinth.com/mod/starter-kit 'The Starterkit Mod') by making all the players spawn in the world with a heart stone. Then, the hunters give to the speedrunner their heartstones and the speedrunner gives the heart stones back to the hunters. Then the hunting can start! For servers, make sure the configs are the same as the ones bundled with the modpack.  It also has e4mc so you dont have to make a server to play manhunt with your friends.**
# --Mods--  
**There is a total of 26 mods.**  
<details>
<summary>Manhunt mods</summary>

**Axes Are Weapons**    
**Cosmetic Armor**  
**Custom Crosshair Mod**  
**Detail Armor Bar**   
**Durability Viewer**  
**Freelook**  
**Heartstone**  
**Starter kit**  
**Universal Graves**  
**e4mc**  
**Zoomify**  

</details>
<details>
<summary>Optimization mods</summary>

**Concurrent Chunk Management Engine**  
**FPS Display**  
**FastAnim**  
**FerriteCore**  
**Lithium**  
**Server Core**  
**Sodium**  
**Starlight**  

</details>
<details>
<summary>Other mods</summary>

**Cloth Config Api**  
**Collective**  
**Fabric Api**  
**Fabric language kotlin**  
**Moonlight lib**  
**Trinkets**  
**YetAnotherConfigLIb**  

</details>

# --Performance--
**The pack performs pretty good. With 2gb and my bad pc i get 200+ fps.(Picture in gallery)**

# --Support--    
**If you have problems or questions with the modpack, dm me (legoaggelos) on discord**
